# Handheld Settings Lab

Handheld Settings Lab publishes handheld PC game settings, calculators, and gear guides.

Core sections:
- /steam-deck-settings/
- /rog-ally-settings/
- /calculators/
- /guides/

Recent guide:
- /guides/rog-ally-update-checklist-before-game-settings/ — source-informed ROG Ally update order for Windows, ASUS support downloads, Armoury Crate SE, power profiles, chargers, docks, and per-game tuning.

Editorial guardrails: do not fabricate benchmark data, test claims, affiliate relationships, or official affiliations.
